notes:
BOOTSTRAP decomposition of the NEW presentation-polish DoD (supersedes the old 9-done behavior progress -- dod_progress reseeded to 6 pending criteria). Six hexagonal parts, one per criterion, built in this order (each visual part touches Cheffy.astro/CheffyPanel.astro CSS, so serialize to avoid diff collisions):
  P1 floating-mascot (crit1)     -- ARMED NOW: research->plan->build->test (+auto AUDIT).
  P2 hat-bubble (crit2)          -- arm next: SVG sizing+bubble button+idle blink/bob+4 expression states+notif dot.
  P3 floating-card-panel (crit3) -- arm after P2: ONE inset floating card that SCALES (min/max clamp, scrim, never a distinct fullscreen), smooth open/close.
  P4 polish (crit4)              -- arm after P3: tailwind brand tokens/spacing/typography, no layout shift, prefers-reduced-motion -> instant.
  P5 screenshot-gate (crit5)     -- arm after P1-P4 all audit-passed (shots must show FINAL pixels): scripts/screenshot-cheffy.mjs (Playwright) -> 9 PNGs in docs/cheffy-shots/ (idle/attention/panel-open x 390/820/1440). Its auto AUDIT = the Sonnet 5a cold check (computed styles + all 9 PNGs exist). Tag this BUILD --criterion <crit5 string> so reconcile-dod flips crit5.
  P5b visual-review (crit5b)     -- arm LAST, depends on P5 committing the 9 PNGs. MANDATORY OPUS rung: dispatch PLAN (->troupe-opus) or DIRECT (->troupe-director), NEVER Sonnet/Haiku/host. Objective: open EACH committed PNG in docs/cheffy-shots/ with the Read tool, judge crit1-4 against the pixels at every breakpoint/state, write per-criterion PASS/FAIL to notes/cheffy-visual-review.md. Tag it --criterion <crit5b string>.

TAGGING POLICY (DoD override): P1-P4 BUILDs are deliberately NOT --criterion-tagged. The visual criteria 1-4 are signed off ONLY by the Opus 5b verdict -- a Sonnet/computed-style pass does NOT satisfy them. So crit1-4 stay 'pending' through their Sonnet audits and are flipped to 'done' by the DIRECTOR at sign-off (direct dod_progress write, per walkthrough.md) ONLY after notes/cheffy-visual-review.md records PASS for that criterion at all 3 breakpoints. reconcile-dod handles only crit5 (P5 build) and crit5b (P5b review job).

SIGN-OFF GATE (DoD 'Done'): npm run build passes, no console errors on any page, the Opus 5b verdict PASSES crit1-4 at all three breakpoints against the committed screenshots, and the site behaves exactly like master with Cheffy JS disabled. Then Director writes the [pr] proposal to MEMORY/CALLBOARD.md and sets production_active=false.

Behavior (state machine/dialogue/calendar/ICS/checklist/notifications) is already built and working -- every rung is PRESENTATION-ONLY; do NOT rebuild or touch behavior JS.
